raw.message: For those who dream of piloting their own Robot!

hook.summary: Intense aerial robot combat resulting in a 'Titan Slayer' achievement.
hook.visual_action: A winged Titan robot flies through a city, firing energy weapons and destroying an enemy robot.

scene_flow: Titan robot engages in aerial combat and destroys a large enemy.
Continuous gameplay footage showing the robot flying and targeting multiple ground units.
Rapid succession of kills earning 'Double Kill' and 'Triple Kill' badges.
Cinematic transition to a glowing mechanical core assembly.
Final brand reveal with the game logo and call to action.
audience_proxy: Male gamers 18-35 interested in mecha combat and competitive multiplayer shooters.
